targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"')) FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT split_part(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '-', 1)) FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes'

WITH bounds AS (SELECT metric_name, MIN(value_num) AS min_v, MAX(value_num) AS max_v FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(max_v - min_v), 0)::bigint FROM bounds

WITH bounds AS (SELECT metric_name, MIN(value_num) AS min_v, MAX(value_num) AS max_v FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND substring(metric_name FROM 'code="([^"]+)"') ~ '^[45]' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(max_v - min_v), 0)::bigint FROM bounds

WITH parsed AS (SELECT metric_name, MAX(value_num) - MIN(value_num) AS req_delta, split_part(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '-', 1) AS namespace, regexp_replace(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '@.+$', '') AS service, substring(metric_name FROM 'code="([^"]+)"') AS code, substring(metric_name FROM 'method="([^"]+)"') AS method FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY metric_name) SELECT namespace, service, SUM(req_delta)::bigint AS requests, SUM(CASE WHEN code ~ '^2' THEN req_delta ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS code_2xx, SUM(CASE WHEN code ~ '^3' THEN req_delta ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS code_3xx, SUM(CASE WHEN code ~ '^4' THEN req_delta ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS code_4xx, SUM(CASE WHEN code ~ '^5' THEN req_delta ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS code_5xx, COUNT(DISTINCT method) AS methods FROM parsed WHERE service IS NOT NULL GROUP BY namespace, service ORDER BY requests DESC

WITH series AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS t, regexp_replace(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '@.+$', '') AS service, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2), top10 AS (SELECT service FROM series GROUP BY service ORDER BY MAX(value) - MIN(value) DESC LIMIT 10), rates AS (SELECT t AS time, s.service AS metric, GREATEST(s.value - LAG(s.value) OVER (PARTITION BY s.service ORDER BY t), 0) / 60.0 AS value FROM series s JOIN top10 USING (service)) SELECT * FROM rates ORDER BY time

SELECT DISTINCT split_part(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '-', 1) AS namespace, regexp_replace(substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"'), '@.+$', '') AS routed_service FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='prometheus_metrics' AND metric_name LIKE 'traefik_service_requests_total%' AND time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' AND substring(metric_name FROM 'service="([^"]+)"') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1, 2
